title: Canonicalize graph and workspace file identity around file ids plus repo-relative paths
summary: Make file ids the primary internal key, make repo-relative paths the canonical stored path identity, and ensure absolute paths are derived only in local worktree runtime code that actually touches the filesystem.

acceptance.label: Graph and workspace identity layers no longer require absolute paths as canonical persisted file identity
Absolute paths are treated as local execution conveniences derived from worktree root plus repo-relative path
